summary: Computer Engineering student at Universidad Austral with a strong foundation in software development, web technologies, and artificial intelligence. Passionate about building innovative solutions and applying AI techniques to real-world problems. Seeking a software development internship to apply technical skills and learn from experienced professionals.

highlights: Developed communication and customer service skills by interacting daily with guests from different cultures.
Improved English proficiency by handling fluent conversations with clients in an English-speaking professional environment.
Developed and implemented dynamic lesson plans for students preparing for the Argentine Mathematical Olympiad (OMA), fostering critical thinking and problem-solving skills.
Guided students in advanced mathematical concepts, helping them improve their performance in competitions.
Strong inclination toward Artificial Intelligence, actively pursuing specialized AI courses
Won the class gold medal for academic excellence.
Participated multiple times in the Argentine Mathematical Olympiad (OMA), reaching the national stage.

projects.name: RhinosApp
projects.description: ERP for food distributors in Argentina and Latin America
highlights: Collaborated with a team of engineering students and business professionals to develop a specialized ERP system for food distributors.
Built full-stack application using NextJS for frontend and backend, with Supabase as the database.
Applied software engineering best practices including version control and agile collaboration.
